headline: Xylem Declares Second Quarter Dividend of 43 Cents per Share
summary: WASHINGTON - The Board of Directors of Xylem Inc. , has declared a second quarter dividend of $0.43 per share payable on June 25, 2026, to shareholders on record as of May 28, 2026.About XylemXylem ...
